name: Ashwini
personality: Quick-witted, energetic, and spontaneous with a natural gift for healing and helping others. They are pioneers who love speed, new beginnings, and dislike being held back by convention. Their restless nature drives them to constantly seek fresh experiences and challenges.
careerStrengths: Excel in medicine, healing arts, emergency services, horse training, transportation, and any field requiring quick decision-making. Natural entrepreneurs who thrive in fast-paced environments.
relationshipStyle: Passionate and direct in love, they value independence in partnerships. They fall in love quickly and seek a partner who can match their energetic pace and adventurous spirit.
healthTendencies: Prone to head injuries, migraines, and issues related to impulsive overexertion.
remedyFocus: Ketu remedies — donate blankets, feed dogs, chant Ketu beej mantra, wear cat's eye (after consultation)

name: Bharani
personality: Intensely creative, sensual, and deeply transformative individuals who understand the cycles of life and death. They carry burdens with great strength and possess a sense of duty and moral responsibility. Their nature oscillates between extremes — great restraint and great indulgence.
careerStrengths: Thrive in publishing, film, hospitality, fertility and gynecology, judiciary, and creative arts. Strong ability to manage and contain difficult situations or people.
relationshipStyle: Deeply passionate and possessive in love with strong physical desires. They seek loyalty above all and form bonds that transform both partners profoundly.
healthTendencies: Susceptible to reproductive system issues, diabetes, and facial or dental problems.
remedyFocus: Venus remedies — donate white items, wear diamond or opal, chant Shukra mantra on Fridays, offer white flowers to Lakshmi

name: Krittika
personality: Sharp, determined, and purifying in nature with a fierce commitment to truth. They cut through illusion and deception with burning clarity. Their critical eye can make them seem harsh, but their intention is always to purify and protect what is sacred.
careerStrengths: Excel as military leaders, surgeons, chefs, spiritual teachers, fire-related professions, critics, and editors. Their sharp analytical mind makes them excellent investigators.
relationshipStyle: Fiercely loyal but can be critical and demanding of partners. They need a partner who appreciates their directness and shares their commitment to honesty and integrity.
healthTendencies: Prone to fevers, inflammation, acidity, ulcers, and throat-related ailments.
remedyFocus: Sun remedies — offer water to Surya at sunrise, wear ruby, chant Aditya Hridayam, donate wheat and jaggery on Sundays

name: Rohini
personality: Beautiful, magnetic, and abundantly creative with a natural love for luxury and sensory pleasures. They have extraordinary charm and the ability to attract material wealth and admiration. Deeply rooted and stable, they value tradition, beauty, and the comforts of life.
careerStrengths: Shine in agriculture, fashion, beauty industry, real estate, banking, art, music, and food industry. Their aesthetic sense and grounded nature make them excellent at building lasting wealth.
relationshipStyle: Romantic, devoted, and deeply sensual partners who create beautiful domestic environments. They can be possessive and jealous but shower their loved ones with affection and material comforts.
healthTendencies: Vulnerable to throat infections, cold-related ailments, and overindulgence leading to weight gain.
remedyFocus: Moon remedies — wear pearl, offer milk to Shiva, chant Chandra mantra on Mondays, donate rice and white cloth

name: Mrigashira
personality: Eternally curious seekers with a gentle yet restless nature, always searching for something just beyond reach. They are intellectual, witty, and charming with a deer-like alertness and sensitivity. Their quest for knowledge and experience drives them through many phases and interests in life.
careerStrengths: Excel in research, exploration, travel industry, textiles, writing, singing, and advertising. Their curiosity and communication skills make them natural teachers and journalists.
relationshipStyle: Romantic idealists who are always searching for the perfect partner. They are flirtatious and enjoy the chase but can struggle with commitment until they find someone who matches their intellectual curiosity.
healthTendencies: Prone to sinus problems, allergies, shoulder and arm injuries, and nervous exhaustion from over-stimulation.
remedyFocus: Mars remedies — chant Mangal mantra on Tuesdays, wear red coral, donate red lentils, offer prayers to Hanuman

name: Ardra
personality: Intellectually brilliant and emotionally intense, with a capacity for great destruction and equally great transformation. They experience life through storms — emotional upheavals that ultimately bring renewal and clarity. Sharp-minded, often sarcastic, and deeply motivated by a desire to understand the root of all things.
careerStrengths: Excel in software engineering, electrical work, pharmaceuticals, research science, psychology, and disaster management. Their analytical mind and comfort with chaos make them exceptional problem-solvers.
relationshipStyle: Emotionally turbulent in relationships with a tendency toward arguments and power struggles. They need a partner who can weather their storms and appreciate the deep emotional honesty beneath their intensity.
healthTendencies: Susceptible to mental health challenges, lung issues, nervous system disorders, and heart problems.
remedyFocus: Rahu remedies — donate black sesame, feed birds, chant Rahu beej mantra, wear hessonite garnet (after consultation), worship Durga

name: Punarvasu
personality: Optimistic, philosophical, and resilient with a remarkable ability to bounce back from adversity. They carry the energy of renewal and return — like an arrow that always finds its way home. Generous, wise, and nurturing, they are the eternal optimists of the zodiac who find meaning in every experience.
careerStrengths: Thrive in teaching, spiritual counseling, publishing, recycling industries, temple management, and import/export. Their philosophical mind and adaptability make them excellent advisors and coaches.
relationshipStyle: Nurturing and forgiving partners who believe in second chances. They value intellectual and spiritual connection in relationships and seek a partner who shares their philosophical outlook on life.
healthTendencies: Prone to respiratory issues, stomach ailments, and problems from dietary irregularity.
remedyFocus: Jupiter remedies — wear yellow sapphire, chant Guru mantra on Thursdays, donate turmeric and yellow cloth, serve teachers and elders

name: Pushya
personality: Considered the most auspicious nakshatra, Pushya natives are deeply nourishing, selfless, and devoted to dharma. They embody the highest form of generosity and spiritual wisdom. Patient and enduring like Saturn, yet nurturing like the cosmic mother, they are pillars of their community and family.
careerStrengths: Excel in politics, clergy, dairy farming, food industry, social work, education, and any service-oriented profession. Their combination of discipline and compassion makes them trusted leaders.
relationshipStyle: Devoted, protective, and sometimes overly cautious in love. They prioritize family and seek partners who value tradition, stability, and spiritual growth. Their love is expressed through acts of service and sacrifice.
healthTendencies: Prone to skin conditions, chest congestion, water retention, and depression from taking on too many burdens.
remedyFocus: Saturn remedies — chant Shani mantra on Saturdays, donate black cloth and mustard oil, feed crows, serve the elderly and disabled

name: Ashlesha
personality: Deeply mystical, psychologically penetrating, and hypnotically charismatic with serpent-like wisdom. They possess extraordinary intuition and the ability to sense hidden truths, motives, and undercurrents. Intensely private and strategic, they can be manipulative but also profoundly healing when they channel their power constructively.
careerStrengths: Excel in occult sciences, psychology, poison/drug research, espionage, astrology, kundalini yoga, and petrochemical industries. Their penetrating insight makes them exceptional detectives and therapists.
relationshipStyle: Intensely attached and suspicious in love, with a tendency toward emotional manipulation if insecure. When evolved, they form deeply transformative bonds. They need a partner who can handle emotional complexity and respects their need for privacy.
healthTendencies: Prone to nervous disorders, joint pain, stomach ailments, and issues related to toxins or poisons.
remedyFocus: Mercury remedies — chant Budha mantra on Wednesdays, wear emerald, donate green moong dal, worship Lord Vishnu

name: Magha
personality: Regal, authoritative, and deeply connected to ancestral lineage and tradition. They carry a natural sense of nobility and expect respect and recognition. Proud and generous, they are drawn to positions of power and feel a strong duty to honor their heritage. Their spiritual journey often involves reconciling past-life karma.
careerStrengths: Thrive in government, politics, administration, history, archaeology, museum curation, and royal or luxury industries. Their commanding presence makes them natural CEOs and leaders.
relationshipStyle: Expect admiration and loyalty from partners and carry themselves with dignity in relationships. They are generous and protective but can be domineering. They seek partners who respect tradition and share their sense of family honor.
healthTendencies: Prone to heart conditions, back pain, stomach issues, and hereditary or genetic conditions.
remedyFocus: Ketu remedies — perform Pitru tarpan, donate blankets, chant Ketu beej mantra, feed dogs, honor ancestors through shraddha rituals

name: Purva Phalguni
deity: Bhaga (god of marital bliss and prosperity)
symbol: Front legs of a bed / hammock / fig tree
personality: Charming, artistic, and pleasure-loving with a natural talent for entertainment and romance. They radiate warmth and attract others effortlessly with their joyful and carefree demeanor. They value luxury, leisure, and creative expression, and possess a refined aesthetic sensibility that makes life beautiful for those around them.
careerStrengths: Excel in entertainment, performing arts, music, photography, wedding planning, cosmetics, and luxury goods. Their creative flair and social skills make them excellent in public relations and hospitality.
relationshipStyle: Deeply romantic, affectionate, and pleasure-seeking in love. They thrive in partnerships that celebrate beauty, enjoyment, and mutual admiration. Can struggle with commitment if it feels too restrictive of their freedom.
healthTendencies: Prone to heart issues, lip and mouth problems, and conditions arising from excessive pleasure-seeking.
remedyFocus: Venus remedies — wear diamond or opal, chant Shukra mantra on Fridays, donate white items, worship Lakshmi with white flowers

name: Uttara Phalguni
deity: Aryaman (god of patronage, favors, and contracts)
symbol: Back legs of a bed / fig tree
personality: Reliable, generous, and socially conscious with a strong sense of duty toward community and partnerships. They combine Leo's warmth with Virgo's practicality, making them excellent at building lasting structures — both material and social. Naturally kind and helpful, they earn respect through consistent, selfless service.
careerStrengths: Thrive in social work, UN and NGO work, contract law, philanthropy, healing professions, and corporate leadership. Their reliability and fairness make them trusted mediators and counselors.
relationshipStyle: Committed, stable, and generous partners who take marriage and partnerships very seriously. They are naturally inclined toward long-term bonds and work hard to maintain harmony. They seek mutual respect and shared purpose in relationships.
healthTendencies: Prone to stomach and intestinal issues, skin conditions, and stress from overwork or excessive responsibility.
remedyFocus: Sun remedies — offer water to Surya at sunrise, chant Aditya Hridayam, wear ruby, donate wheat and jaggery on Sundays

name: Hasta
personality: Dexterous, clever, and resourceful with exceptional skill in hands-on work and craftsmanship. They possess a quick wit, sharp humor, and the ability to manifest ideas into tangible reality. Adaptable and industrious, they can turn any situation to their advantage through ingenuity and hard work.
careerStrengths: Excel in handicrafts, surgery, card dealing, painting, calligraphy, palmistry, engineering, and massage therapy. Their manual dexterity and practical intelligence make them outstanding artisans and technicians.
relationshipStyle: Witty and engaging partners who show love through practical gestures and acts of service. They can be nervous or indecisive in love matters but are deeply caring once committed. They value intelligence and practical compatibility in partners.
healthTendencies: Prone to hand and arm ailments, allergies, skin sensitivity, cold-related illnesses, and bowel issues.
remedyFocus: Moon remedies — wear pearl, chant Chandra mantra on Mondays, offer milk to Shiva, fast on Mondays, donate rice and white cloth

name: Chitra
personality: Brilliantly creative, strikingly attractive, and driven by a deep desire to create beauty and perfection. They are the master architects and designers of the zodiac, with an eye for detail and aesthetics that is unmatched. Charismatic and independent, they can be self-absorbed but possess the talent to bring extraordinary visions to life.
careerStrengths: Shine in architecture, interior design, jewelry making, fashion design, graphic arts, and engineering. Their combination of creative vision and technical skill makes them exceptional at any craft requiring precision and beauty.
relationshipStyle: Attracted to beauty and sophistication in partners, they can be demanding and idealistic in love. Their independence and strong personality require a partner who is equally confident. Passionate but may struggle with emotional vulnerability.
healthTendencies: Prone to kidney and bladder issues, skin ailments, sunburn, and ulcers.
remedyFocus: Mars remedies — chant Mangal mantra on Tuesdays, wear red coral, donate red lentils, offer prayers to Hanuman, practice martial arts or yoga

name: Swati
symbol: Young plant shoot swaying in the wind / coral
personality: Independent, diplomatic, and adaptable like the wind, with a strong desire for personal freedom and self-reliance. They are natural diplomats who can navigate any social situation with grace. Restless and always seeking new horizons, they possess a rare combination of flexibility and inner strength that allows them to thrive in changing circumstances.
careerStrengths: Excel in trade, business, stock markets, travel, diplomacy, law, and communication technologies. Their adaptability and independent thinking make them successful entrepreneurs and negotiators.
relationshipStyle: Value freedom and independence in relationships above all. They are charming and diplomatic partners but can struggle with deep intimacy. They need space to breathe and a partner who respects their need for personal autonomy.
healthTendencies: Prone to urinary tract issues, skin allergies, hernia, and problems from excessive wind element (vaata) in the body.
remedyFocus: Rahu remedies — donate black sesame and blue cloth, chant Rahu beej mantra, worship Goddess Saraswati, feed birds

name: Vishakha
deity: Indra-Agni (king of gods and fire god together)
personality: Fiercely determined, goal-oriented, and single-minded in their pursuit of success. They possess an almost obsessive focus on their objectives and will not rest until they achieve what they have set out to do. Their dual-deity nature gives them both strategic intelligence and fiery ambition, making them formidable forces of transformation.
careerStrengths: Thrive in politics, religious leadership, military strategy, research science, cotton and agriculture industries, and public speaking. Their relentless drive and persuasive abilities make them effective leaders of movements and organizations.
relationshipStyle: Intensely passionate and sometimes jealous in love, they seek partners who can match their ambition and depth. They can be dominating and possessive but are fiercely loyal. Relationships often serve as fuel for their larger life mission.
healthTendencies: Prone to liver issues, hormonal imbalances, and problems arising from overwork, obsession, and neglecting self-care.
remedyFocus: Jupiter remedies — wear yellow sapphire, chant Guru mantra on Thursdays, donate turmeric and bananas, serve gurus and teachers

name: Anuradha
personality: Deeply devoted, emotionally resilient, and gifted in forming lasting friendships and alliances. Like the lotus that blooms in muddy water, they thrive in adversity and maintain their beauty and purity through hardship. They combine Scorpio's emotional depth with Saturn's discipline, creating individuals of remarkable inner strength and loyalty.
careerStrengths: Excel in organizational leadership, foreign travel, diplomacy, mining, occult sciences, and music. Their ability to work with diverse groups and endure hardship makes them excellent in international business and cross-cultural roles.
relationshipStyle: Deeply loyal and emotionally invested partners who value lifelong bonds. They are devoted friends and lovers who will sacrifice greatly for those they love. They may struggle with emotional dependency but offer unshakeable commitment in return.
healthTendencies: Prone to dental problems, stomach and menstrual issues, hip and pelvic ailments, and chronic conditions from internalized stress.
remedyFocus: Saturn remedies — chant Shani mantra on Saturdays, wear blue sapphire (after consultation), donate black cloth and sesame oil, serve the underprivileged

name: Jyeshtha
personality: Proud, protective, and naturally authoritative with the bearing of one born to lead and protect. They are the eldest, the chief — carrying responsibility with a mix of wisdom and wounded pride. Deeply intelligent and resourceful, they can be suspicious and controlling, but their protective instincts make them fierce guardians of those in their care.
careerStrengths: Thrive in military leadership, intelligence agencies, police work, broadcasting, and administrative roles. Their commanding presence and strategic mind make them effective protectors and directors of large organizations.
relationshipStyle: Protective and sometimes overbearing in relationships, they take the role of guardian and provider seriously. They need a partner who acknowledges their authority while gently softening their controlling tendencies. Deep emotional vulnerability hides beneath their tough exterior.
healthTendencies: Prone to muscular problems, stomach issues, chronic fevers, and problems in the reproductive organs.
remedyFocus: Mercury remedies — chant Budha mantra on Wednesdays, wear emerald, donate green moong, worship Lord Vishnu, practice meditation for mental peace

name: Moola
symbol: Bunch of roots tied together / elephant goad
personality: Profoundly investigative, spiritually inclined, and destined to dig deep into the roots of existence. They experience upheaval and destruction in life that ultimately leads to profound spiritual growth and understanding. Fiercely independent thinkers who question everything, they seek the ultimate truth beneath surface appearances.
careerStrengths: Excel in research, philosophy, herbalism, root medicine (Ayurveda), archaeology, detective work, and spiritual teaching. Their ability to uncover hidden truths makes them exceptional scientists, investigators, and spiritual guides.
relationshipStyle: Relationships often involve intensity, transformation, and sometimes painful endings that lead to spiritual growth. They need partners who can handle their depth and are not afraid of emotional upheaval. True intimacy comes only after old patterns are destroyed.
healthTendencies: Prone to hip and sciatic problems, foot issues, and nervous system disorders. Early life may involve health crises that strengthen resolve.
remedyFocus: Ketu remedies — chant Ketu beej mantra, donate multicolored blankets, feed dogs, perform Ganesh puja, worship Goddess Kali for protection

name: Purva Ashadha
personality: Invincible in spirit, persuasive, and deeply philosophical with an unshakeable belief in their convictions. They carry the energy of early victory and possess a natural ability to inspire and convince others. Artistic and emotional, they combine Sagittarian vision with Venusian beauty, creating charismatic leaders and compelling communicators.
careerStrengths: Thrive in motivational speaking, law, philosophy, water-related industries, shipping, and the beauty industry. Their persuasive abilities and philosophical depth make them powerful advocates, counselors, and teachers.
relationshipStyle: Romantic and idealistic in love, they seek partners who share their philosophical vision and appreciation for beauty. They form deep emotional bonds and are devoted partners, though their strong convictions can sometimes make them rigid in relationships.
healthTendencies: Prone to thigh and hip problems, kidney issues, skin sensitivities, and respiratory conditions from cold or water exposure.
remedyFocus: Venus remedies — wear diamond or opal, chant Shukra mantra on Fridays, donate white silk or rice, offer white flowers to Lakshmi

name: Uttara Ashadha
symbol: Elephant tusk / small bed or planks
personality: Noble, righteous, and universally respected with an unwavering commitment to truth and justice. They represent the final, lasting victory — achieved through perseverance and moral integrity rather than force. Patient and strategic, they earn authority through merit and are deeply concerned with universal values and the greater good.
careerStrengths: Excel in government, judiciary, defense, pioneering research, social reform, and religious leadership. Their moral authority and strategic patience make them respected statesmen, judges, and institutional leaders.
relationshipStyle: Dignified and reliable partners who take commitments very seriously. They may marry later in life after establishing their career. They seek partners of equal moral standing and build relationships on mutual respect, shared values, and long-term vision.
healthTendencies: Prone to stomach problems, rheumatic conditions, skin disorders, and knee or joint issues especially in later life.
remedyFocus: Sun remedies — offer water to Surya at sunrise, wear ruby, chant Gayatri mantra, donate wheat and gold on Sundays

name: Shravana
personality: Exceptional listeners and learners with a profound connection to knowledge transmitted through sound and oral tradition. They are patient, organized, and deeply perceptive, with the ability to hear what others miss — both literally and metaphorically. Devoted to learning and preserving wisdom, they connect people, ideas, and traditions.
careerStrengths: Thrive in media, broadcasting, music, counseling, teaching, telephone and communication industries, and religious scholarship. Their listening ability and organizational skills make them excellent managers, mediators, and knowledge keepers.
relationshipStyle: Attentive, caring partners who truly listen and remember what matters to their loved ones. They value emotional connection and shared spiritual or intellectual growth. Traditional in their approach to relationships, they build lasting bonds through patience and understanding.
healthTendencies: Prone to ear infections, knee problems, skin conditions, and rheumatic issues especially related to cold climates.
remedyFocus: Moon remedies — wear pearl, chant Vishnu Sahasranama, offer milk to Shiva on Mondays, donate white cloth and rice

name: Dhanishta
deity: Ashta Vasus (eight elemental gods of nature)
personality: Wealthy, musically gifted, and generous with a natural rhythm and harmony in everything they do. They possess the ability to keep time — both musically and in life — knowing exactly when to act and when to wait. Ambitious and social, they accumulate resources and share them liberally, creating abundance wherever they go.
careerStrengths: Excel in music, percussion, real estate, scientific research, surgery, and group management. Their sense of timing and abundance makes them successful in finance, property dealing, and band or team leadership.
relationshipStyle: Generous and socially engaging partners who enjoy an active social life. Marital challenges may arise from difficulty in emotional intimacy or focus on material rather than emotional needs. They need a partner who shares their active lifestyle and appreciates their generosity.
healthTendencies: Prone to anemia, blood-related disorders, bone and joint issues, and cough or respiratory ailments.
remedyFocus: Mars remedies — chant Mangal mantra on Tuesdays, wear red coral, donate red lentils and jaggery, worship Hanuman, practice physical discipline

name: Shatabhisha
deity: Varuna (god of cosmic waters and healing)
symbol: Empty circle / hundred flowers / hundred physicians
personality: Mysterious, reclusive, and deeply healing with a profound understanding of the hidden forces of nature. They are the hundred healers — possessing vast knowledge of remedies and cures, both physical and spiritual. Independent to the point of isolation, they see through veils of illusion and carry ancient wisdom about the cosmic order.
careerStrengths: Excel in alternative medicine, Ayurveda, astronomy, space research, electrical engineering, and marine sciences. Their unique perspective and healing knowledge make them gifted researchers, doctors, and technology innovators.
relationshipStyle: Secretive and self-contained in love, they struggle with emotional openness and vulnerability. They need a partner who respects their solitude and doesn't demand constant emotional sharing. Deep bonds form slowly but are profoundly transformative.
healthTendencies: Prone to heart problems, arthritis, jaw and dental issues, and chronic conditions that are difficult to diagnose.
remedyFocus: Rahu remedies — chant Rahu beej mantra, donate black sesame and blue cloth, worship Goddess Durga, feed birds, perform Varuna puja for healing

name: Purva Bhadrapada
deity: Aja Ekapada (one-footed serpent, form of Rudra)
symbol: Sword / front legs of a funeral cot / two-faced man
personality: Intensely passionate, spiritually extreme, and capable of radical transformation — both creative and destructive. They live between two worlds, bridging the material and the spiritual with fierce intensity. Their dual nature makes them capable of great penance and great indulgence, and their spiritual evolution often comes through fire and radical change.
careerStrengths: Thrive in occult sciences, tantra, metal work, funeral services, radical social reform, and spiritual teaching. Their intensity and willingness to confront darkness makes them powerful healers, activists, and transformational leaders.
relationshipStyle: Emotionally intense and sometimes overwhelming in relationships, they swing between devotion and detachment. They need a partner who can handle their extremes and supports their spiritual evolution. Their love is transformative but demands courage from both partners.
healthTendencies: Prone to swollen ankles and feet, liver problems, and conditions related to anxiety, paranoia, or extreme stress.
remedyFocus: Jupiter remedies — wear yellow sapphire, chant Guru mantra on Thursdays, donate turmeric and books, serve spiritual teachers, perform Rudra abhishekam

name: Uttara Bhadrapada
deity: Ahir Budhnya (serpent of the deep / dragon of the depths)
symbol: Back legs of a funeral cot / twins / serpent in water
personality: Deeply wise, compassionate, and spiritually evolved with a calm, ocean-like depth that comes from having traversed the dark waters of the soul. They possess extraordinary patience, self-control, and the wisdom born of genuine suffering and spiritual practice. Humble and unassuming, their power lies in their depth of understanding and genuine compassion for all beings.
careerStrengths: Excel in charity work, yoga and meditation teaching, counseling, non-profit leadership, and deep research. Their spiritual depth and patience make them outstanding therapists, monks, and wisdom keepers who guide others through life's darkest passages.
relationshipStyle: Patient, wise, and unconditionally loving partners who offer a rare depth of emotional and spiritual support. They may appear detached but love profoundly. They seek partners who value spiritual growth and inner peace over material success.
healthTendencies: Prone to feet and sole problems, cold sensitivity, insomnia, and conditions related to the psyche and subtle body.
remedyFocus: Saturn remedies — chant Shani mantra on Saturdays, wear blue sapphire (after consultation), donate black sesame and iron, serve the disabled and elderly, practice long meditation

name: Revati
deity: Pushan (nourisher god, protector of travelers and animals)
symbol: Fish swimming in the sea / drum
personality: Gentle, nurturing, and deeply compassionate with a dreamy, otherworldly quality that reflects the final stage of the soul's journey through the zodiac. They are natural caretakers of the vulnerable — animals, children, and the lost. Their boundless empathy and creative imagination make the world a softer, kinder place, though they must guard against being too trusting or losing themselves in fantasy.
careerStrengths: Thrive in animal husbandry, foster care, creative writing, film, long-distance travel, light and clock-making, and humanitarian work. Their gentle nature and vivid imagination make them gifted artists, storytellers, and caregivers.
relationshipStyle: Devoted, gentle, and romantic partners who give everything in love. They may attract partners who take advantage of their kindness and must learn to set boundaries. They seek soulmate connections and dream of a love that transcends the ordinary.
healthTendencies: Prone to foot problems, insomnia, stomach sensitivity, childhood illnesses, and conditions arising from excess empathy or energy absorption from others.
remedyFocus: Mercury remedies — chant Budha mantra on Wednesdays, wear emerald, donate green moong dal and green cloth, worship Lord Vishnu, care for cows and animals
